title: Studio – Curated Design Studio
introText: Every interior begins with how it will be used day to day: the routines, the circulation, and the way light changes across a space. From there, we build a material language that feels calm, tactile, and quietly confident.
workParagraphs: Clean lines, warm proportions, and details that hold up at close range — joinery, hardware, finishes, and the way materials meet.
Rather than chasing trends, the focus is on layouts that genuinely work, robust materials, and a palette that can evolve with your life or brand.

processSteps.title: 01. Brief & concept
processSteps.text: We define needs, constraints, and priorities, then develop the initial concept with layouts and mood direction.

processSteps.title: 02. Design development
processSteps.text: We refine plans, finishes, lighting, and joinery detail, aligning the design intent with budget realities.

processSteps.title: 03. Delivery & styling
processSteps.text: We coordinate with contractors/suppliers as needed, then complete the space with furniture, art, and styling.

locationsText: Based in London, working across the UK and selected international projects. Collaborations include architects, developers, and private clients on both new-build and refurbishment schemes.
